_comment: Payable items. amount_cents drives Stripe Payment Link creation (scripts/stripe-links.mjs). payment_url is filled in by that script. custom_amount=true creates a customer-chooses-amount link (used for T&E). Collection only — disbursing funds is human-authorized.
rate_note: All services are $228 per hour or $5,000 per day, plus travel & expenses (T&E).
